name: Worldly
description: A seasoned traveler and social operator. Masters of persuasion, trade, and survival in civilized society.

name: Barbarian
description: Fearsome warriors from harsh lands. Driven by primal instinct, near-limitless endurance, and raw power.

name: Acrobat
description: Nimble and quick, the Acrobat excels at movement, evasion, and getting into (and out of) impossible situations.

name: Ranger / Woodsman
description: Expert trackers, hunters, and wilderness survivalists. Often has an affinity with specific terrains or enemies.

name: Rogue
description: Cunning operatives skilled in stealth, subterfuge, and precision strikes. Masters of the shadows.

name: Guardsman
description: Disciplined fighters trained in organized combat, defense, and martial tactics.

name: Druid
description: Protectors of the natural world with deep attunement to the weave of nature. Magic flows through Enlightenment.

name: Conjurer
description: Arcane specialists who summon and bind entities from beyond. Magic flows through Thaumaturgy.

name: Enlightened
description: Those who can see the lines connecting all things. Gifted with divine perception and spiritual power.

name: Warlock
description: Those who have made pacts with powerful beings for arcane power. Magic flows through Thaumaturgy.

name: Mage / Magician
description: Scholarly practitioners of the arcane arts. Power derived from study, knowledge, and Thaumaturgy.

name: Holy Warrior
description: Warriors empowered by divine faith. Combines martial skill with Enlightenment-based divine magic.

name: Custom (GM Defined)
description: A custom archetype defined with your GM. Adjust the Powers and Magic toggles below as appropriate.
